Security resources

NEET and JEE portals: security starting points

A defensive checklist for thinking about security around high-volume education portals.

What you’re getting

Use the official security and disclosure channels below. Never probe a live portal without written permission.

Use it well

A three-step starting point.

  1. 01

    Learn the common web risks in OWASP’s defensive guidance.

  2. 02

    Use CERT-In and the portal’s own disclosure channel for reporting.

  3. 03

    Keep research inside a permitted test environment with a written scope.

Verified destinations

Open the sources.

OWASP Top 10 ↗ CERT-In ↗ OWASP Web Security Testing Guide ↗

Important context

This page is for defensive learning and responsible disclosure, not unauthorized testing.
